query:
SELECT cs.id, cs.shotNumber, cs.videoUrl, cs.videoStatus, c.title, c.genre, c.brief
FROM campaign_shots cs
JOIN campaigns c ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
  AND cs.videoStatus = 'complete'
  AND (LOWER(c.title) LIKE '%fog%' OR LOWER(c.brief) LIKE '%fog%' OR LOWER(c.genre) = 'experimental')
ORDER BY c.id, cs.shotNumber;
